hypothesis: Stale-cycle runner hardening becomes safer if `sysopt.runner-stability-*` cards with `runner_focus` `stale-cycle` must prove the exact stale-lock evidence pair already exposed by the runner scripts, so stale-cycle cards cannot drift onto generic recovery replay.
failure_mode: A stale-cycle card can currently satisfy the generic runner evidence boundary with replayable commands that do not prove stale-lock handling specifically, so autonomy hardening can claim stale-cycle coverage without the exact stale-lock replay surface.
closed_fail_rule: Keep the slice only if stale-cycle runner-stability cards fail verification unless they keep the exact stale-lock evidence contract and any `claw:health` observability stays trailing.
measurement: Before the ratchet, `node CLAW/scripts/verify-systems-optimizer.mjs` accepted `sysopt.runner-stability-*` cards with `runner_focus` `stale-cycle` even if `evidence_commands` drifted to generic replayable recovery proof such as `node CLAW/scripts/recover-cycle.mjs --max-age-minutes=0` plus trailing `node CLAW/scripts/run-site-script.mjs claw:health`, because the verifier only enforced the generic runner boundary, replayability, and observability ordering. After the ratchet, the verifier rejects any stale-cycle card that does not keep the exact stale-lock evidence contract `node CLAW/scripts/recover-cycle.mjs --max-age-minutes=0`, then `node CLAW/scripts/run-recovery-drill.mjs --scenario=stale-lock`, with optional trailing `node CLAW/scripts/run-site-script.mjs claw:health`, while the fixed scope-local promotion bundle stays green.
keep_rule: Keep only if stale-cycle runner-stability cards fail verification unless they preserve the exact stale-lock evidence contract and the fixed scope-local evaluation bundle passes without touching route implementation paths.
learning_item: Stale-cycle runner evidence must stay bound to the exact stale-lock proof pair; generic recovery replay is not specific enough to prove the stale-cycle surface.
